# awscc_certificatemanager_acme_external_account_binding (Resource)

Resource Type definition for AWS::CertificateManager::AcmeExternalAccountBinding



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `acme_endpoint_arn` (String) The ARN of the ACME endpoint this binding is associated with.
- `role_arn` (String) The IAM role ARN for cross-account access.

### Optional

- `expiration` (Attributes) The expiration configuration for the external account binding. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--expiration))
- `tags` (Attributes List) Tags associated with the external account binding. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

### Read-Only

- `acme_external_account_binding_arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the external account binding.
- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

<a id="nestedatt--expiration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `expiration`

Optional:

- `type` (String) The time unit for the expiration value.
- `value` (Number) The expiration value.


<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Optional:

- `key` (String) The key name of the tag.
- `value` (String) The value for the tag.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_certificatemanager_acme_external_account_binding.example
  identity = {
    acme_external_account_binding_arn = "acme_external_account_binding_arn"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema

#### Required

- `acme_external_account_binding_arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the external account binding

#### Optional

- `account_id` (String) AWS Account where this resource is managed
- `region` (String) Region where this resource is managed

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_certificatemanager_acme_external_account_binding.example
  id = "acme_external_account_binding_arn"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import awscc_certificatemanager_acme_external_account_binding.example "acme_external_account_binding_arn"
```
